message:
wip: Start ZigBuilder migration - 13 modules migrated

Migrated simple stub modules to use ZigBuilder:
- antigravity_mod.zig
- _statistics_mod.zig
- _posixshmem_mod.zig
- _wmi_mod.zig
- _crypt_mod.zig
- pydoc_data_mod.zig
- _codecs_*_mod.zig (6 modules: iso2022, hk, jp, cn, kr, tw)
- _bisect_mod.zig (partial - stubs use builder, complex logic still uses emit)

All simple values now use ZigValue.int/float/string/raw + builder.emitValue()
Complex control flow still uses emit until full builder API integration.

13/308 modules started (4%)
